case_title: MATAMOROS, DENISA JOSE VS GATDULA, MARIA GEMMA D. et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,064.00 FILED BY MATAMOROS, DENISA JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT GATDULA, MARIA GEMMA D. MYRENG, JOSIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GATDULA, MARIA GEMMA D. MYRENG, JOSIE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GATDULA, MARIA GEMMA D.
PROOF OF SERVICE ON M.G.GATDULA NOT ACCEPTED BY SYSTEM:"POS ON FILE".
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-28-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-14-2006 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED, PLAINTIFF ADDED ANOTHER DEFENDANT.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MYRENG, JOSIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATAMOROS, DENISA JOSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GATDULA, MARIA GEMMA D. MYRENG, JOSIE $638.43 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $728.43, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1064.13; AND ATTRIBUTES COMPARATIVE FAULT AS FOLLOWS: 40% TO PLAINTIFF MATAMOROS; 60% TO DEFENDANT GATDULA, AS DRIVER OF THE VEHICLE OWNED BY DEFENDANT JOSIE MYRENG. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
